calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Sole Surving Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Loren Lopin for Bill Gerwick (Petitioner/Trustee).

Ms. Lopin stated that the Settlor created the Trust in 1997, that there were several amendments to it, that there was then revocation of the Trust and a new Trust in place, that this piece of property has been mentioned through out the petition and that it is an asset of the Trust. Mr. Lopin also stated that the person assisting the Settlor was not an Attorney, that they did not record a new deed with a new date, that the last Trust mentioned the property and the APN number through the document, and that the Settlor's intent was to have the property in the Trust. The Petition for Order Confirming Sole Surviving Trustee and Trust Assets is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
